weapon_type: long assault rifle with a curved detachable magazine
source: mesh-derived semantic mask centres and accepted manual calibration
silhouette_notes: long horizontal body with a broad receiver as the main readable canvas
curved magazine creates a strong downward secondary panel
stock and handguard can carry a continuous longitudinal visual flow
thin barrel and muzzle lose small details and should remain visually quiet

component_functions.stock: rear supporting canvas and narrative opening
component_functions.magazine: curved secondary panel below the focal area
component_functions.pistol_grip: small grounding transition with limited readable detail
component_functions.handguard: long connector canvas carrying directional flow
component_functions.front_assembly: transition from detailed body to quiet barrel
component_functions.barrel_muzzle: thin terminal area requiring very low detail
